scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client --include=dev
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client && npm run build:trainer --prefix client
scripts.build:owner-apk: npm run build:owner --prefix client && npm run cap:sync --prefix client
scripts.build:trainer-apk: npm run setup:trainer-android --prefix client && npm run build:trainer --prefix client && npm run cap:sync:trainer --prefix client
